Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag
Crafted from white canvas and leather, this Gucci Jackie series shoulder bag showcases the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware and a matching strap with red and green webbing offer more styling possibilities.
Model: 782849
Color: White canvas with brown leather
Dimensions: 27.5x19x4cm
